server.name: dc-hub-data-center-intelligence
server.description: Data center industry intelligence platform tracking 20,000+ physical facilities, M&A transactions, construction pipeline, and power infrastructure across 140+ countries. NOT a data catalog or metadata platform.

tools.name: search_facilities
tools.description: Search physical data center facilities by market, operator, tier level, or power capacity

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Get data center M&A transactions with buyer, seller, price, and deal details

tools.name: get_site_score
tools.description: Score a potential data center site on energy costs, carbon intensity, connectivity, risk, and cost factors

tools.name: get_grid_fuel_mix
tools.description: Get real-time power grid generation fuel mix for US ISOs (ERCOT, PJM, CAISO, MISO, SPP, NYISO, ISO-NE)

tools.name: get_market_data
tools.description: Get data center market vacancy rates, pricing, inventory, and trends

tools.name: ask_dc_hub
tools.description: Ask a natural language question about the data center industry and get a citable answer

q.description: Natural language question about data centers

authentication.description: Free tier: 100 requests/day with no API key. Pro/Enterprise tiers require an API key via X-API-Key header.
